description: We have been nominated for Best BBQ in the Best of Dayton. Voting is now open, and you can cast your vote once daily. We are grateful for your support in our nomination and hope to win this category.

profileSummary:
We have been nominated for Best BBQ in the Best of Dayton. Voting is now open, and you can cast your vote once daily. We are grateful for your support in our nomination and hope to win this category.
Hours: Closed now
Address: 1334 Linden Ave, Dayton, OH, United States, 45410
Phone: 265.663 7265
Email: FatBacksBarbecue@gmail.com

Recent posts from their Facebook page:
1. We have been nominated for Best BBQ in the Best of Dayton. Voting is now open, and you can cast your vote once daily. We are grateful for your support in our nomination and hope to win this category.
2. We cook our barbecue low and slow on seasoned hickory wood to bring out the natural flavors.
3. Best of Dayton 2026 voting open through May 15: Vote here
4. The Best of Dayton nominations are in, and the ballot is open for voting.
5. FATBACK'S BBQ is feeling grateful.

layoutDescription: Restrained luxury: large margins, small caps labels sparingly, one hero image with lots of negative space; serif display + clean sans body.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 8 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
